script:
few months ago I was driving home late at night after a long shift.
I rolled up to a red light and leaned back in my seat, exhausted.
As I looked into my rearview mirror, I saw someone sitting in my back seat.
Just a dark silhouette.
I didn’t even think—I immediately whipped around.
Nothing.
The seat was empty.
I tried convincing myself it was a shadow from the streetlight.
Then the light turned green, so I started driving again.
But when I hit the next red light, I checked the mirror again.
The silhouette was back.
This time leaning forward.
I turned around again, heart pounding.
Still nothing.
When I looked back at the mirror a third time, the silhouette was gone.
But on the seat behind me, the seatbelt was buckled.
